notes: Pure auto-pipeline noise. Files touched by the 12 auto commits in this window (spot-checked from GHA patterns): docs/data/latest_hash.txt, docs/data/live_data.json, docs/data/status_history.json, docs/tracking.html, latest_hash.txt, monitor_log.txt, status_history.json — same routine set as prior polls. Counterargument for record (per user preference): a 12-hour gap between polls produces about half the auto-commit volume of a 24-hour gap, so the 12 auto commits here is consistent rate not a slowdown. Opposing consideration: the rate parity confirms the auto-pipeline is healthy and live — silent-ignore is what the live system is actively choosing to emit, not a stalled service.
